posts.title: Ford rehires 350 engineers after AI fails to preserve expertise or train juniors.   Lesson: Don't be Fordtarded

link_metadata.description: Ford Motor Co. took an unusually human approach to fixing its stubborn quality problems: It brought back what it calls “gray beard” engineers to help train younger staff and to reprogram the artificial intelligence tools that weren’t getting the job done.
link_metadata.title: Ford Has Been Rehiring Quality Inspectors After AI Fell Short
